These things are outside React’s job.

So useEffect lets you run code after Reac

title: useEffect hook Simple and accurate explanation
description:
React has one job:
👉 Take data → show UI

But real apps need more than just showing UI. You also need to:


fetch data from APIs
set timers
store data
listen to events


These things are outside React’s job.

So useEffect lets you run code after Reac
